expo.name: SilentZone Pro
expo.description: Professional location-based silent zone management for Android devices

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses your location to detect when you enter or exit a silent zone.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location in the background to automatically manage silent zones.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: This app uses your location in the background to automatically manage silent zones.
